title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast hosted by Tim Hwang analyzes Anthropic's new Claude Fable 5 model, particularly its tier routing system, and discusses Apple's shift away from on-device AI to partner with NVIDIA for cloud compute. The episode also debates whether AI models can detect sarcasm and the role of multimodal inputs versus context alone.
writeup: This episode of IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast, hosted by Tim Hwang, breaks down Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and its tier routing system, plus Apple's pivot away from on-device AI toward a partnership with NVIDIA for cloud compute. The discussion frames two shifts: how a model directs requests across tiers, and how a vendor known for local processing moves toward external cloud infrastructure. The panel also debates whether AI models can detect sarcasm, weighing multimodal inputs against context alone.
